productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Sleekwana Uf+ Purple Flip Flops
description: Designed with a fast and sporty look, these adidas Sleekwana slides are absolutely comfortable and stylish. Slide into them and flaunt your feet with pride.UpperThong styled padded synthetic straps for absolute comfort Toe separator for comfort wear Stitch detailing on the straps for durability and style supercloud soft quick-dry sport footbed with designed grooves for enhanced grip and comfortable all-day wear Brand name printed on the heel for styleOutsoleInjected EVA outsole for lightweight comfort Circular grooves in the forefoot with a pivot point on big toe mound for easy moveMent Mildly grooved heel region with water droplet grooves for enhanced grip Ergonomically designed with lugs along the lateral forefootSlide careWipe dust with a damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
